Aurora.trading_pattern: Aurora's Q poke and dive damage are strong. Her projectiles outrange your Q. Play around her poke.
Aurora.ability_to_dodge: Her R dive — move perpendicular to avoid. It stuns and deals area damage.
Aurora.early_game: Aurora outpokes from range. Play safe and farm Q damage.
Aurora.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. Her poke is still strong. Teamfight grouped.
Aurora.late_game: She outscales through ranged poke. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Aurora.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Aurora.scaling: Aurora outscales through ranged damage. You scale as a tank.
Aurora.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Group for fights.

Olaf.trading_pattern: Olaf Q spam is relentless. His R makes him unstoppable. You can't lock him down early.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: His Q axes — dodge by moving sideways. His R removes your CC.
Olaf.early_game: Olaf outpokes with Q spam. Play safe and farm.
Olaf.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His R removes CC. Teamfight grouped.
Olaf.late_game: He outscales as a diver. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Olaf.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Olaf.scaling: Olaf outscales as a diver. You scale as a tank.
Olaf.positioning: Hide behind minions for Q reduction. Group for fights.

Heimerdinger.trading_pattern: Heimerdinger's turrets zone you entirely. You can't engage without taking turret fire.
Heimerdinger.ability_to_dodge: His turret missiles — move sideways to dodge. Avoid walking into turret zones.
Heimerdinger.early_game: Heimerdinger zones with turrets. Play safe and farm.
Heimerdinger.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His turrets are oppressive. Teamfight grouped.
Heimerdinger.late_game: He outscales through turret damage. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Heimerdinger.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Heimerdinger.scaling: Heimerdinger outscales through turrets. You scale as a tank.
Heimerdinger.positioning: Avoid turret zones. Group for fights.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's range and healing outclass you early. She scales to unkillable late.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down before she heals. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: Kayle's poke is annoying. Play safe and farm.
Kayle.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. She scales with items. Teamfight grouped.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales dramatically. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Kayle.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Kayle.scaling: Kayle outscales dramatically. You scale as a tank.
Kayle.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Group for fights.

Sett.trading_pattern: Sett's all-in is devastating. His W grit slam burst is high. You can't fight his all-in early.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: His W grit slam — move away when he builds grit. It stuns and bursts you.
Sett.early_game: Sett's all-in is too strong. Play safe and farm.
Sett.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His all-in is still strong. Teamfight grouped.
Sett.late_game: He outscales through tankiness. You scale as a support tank. Even matchup.
Sett.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Sett.positioning: Move away when his grit builds. Group for fights.

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia's Q poke is strong. Your E taunt is hard to land on her. Play around her W wall.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Her R frozen tomb — move away from the center. It damages and slows.
Anivia.early_game: Anivia outpokes. Play safe and farm.
Anivia.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. Her poke is still strong. Teamfight grouped.
Anivia.late_game: She outscales through poke and control. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Anivia.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Anivia.scaling: Anivia outscales as a control mage. You scale as a tank.
Anivia.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Group for fights.

Malzahar.trading_pattern: Malzahar's voidlings zone you. His R suppress is devastating. You can't fight into voidlings.
Malzahar.ability_to_dodge: His R suppress — move away before he channels. He locks you down completely.
Malzahar.early_game: Malzahar zones with voidlings. Play safe and farm.
Malzahar.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His voidlings are oppressive. Teamfight grouped.
Malzahar.late_game: He outscales through zoning. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Malzahar.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Malzahar.scaling: Malzahar outscales through zoning. You scale as a tank.
Malzahar.positioning: Avoid voidling zones. Group for fights.

Cassiope.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia's Q poison outranges you. Her poke is relentless. Play around her range.
Cassiope.ability_to_dodge: Her R petrify — move sideways to avoid. It stuns instantly.
Cassiope.early_game: Cassiopeia outpokes from range. Play safe and farm.
Cassiope.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. Her poke is still strong. Teamfight grouped.
Cassiope.late_game: She outscales through range and poke. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Cassiope.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Cassiope.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales through range. You scale as a tank.
Cassiope.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Group for fights.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. His ult execute is dangerous. Play around his engage.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Back away from his engage.
Darius.early_game: Darius is strong early. Play safe and farm.
Darius.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His ult is dangerous. Teamfight grouped.
Darius.late_game: He outscales through ult utility. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Darius.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Darius.scaling: Darius outscales through ult. You scale as a tank.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to avoid Q outer ring. Group for fights.

Renekton.trading_pattern: Renekton's Fury combos are strong early. Your E taunt is good but risky.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: His empowered W stun — move perpendicular to avoid. If stunned, he combos.
Renekton.early_game: Renekton is strong early. Play safe and farm.
Renekton.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His combo is still strong. Teamfight grouped.
Renekton.late_game: You outscale as a tank support. Renekton early-game focused. Even late.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Renekton.scaling: You outscale as a support tank late.
Renekton.positioning: Move perpendicular to his W. Group for fights.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: Yasuo dashes through minions with E. His windwall blocks your Q. Play around it.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: His E-Q combo chain — move away from minions. Windwall blocks your Q.
Yasuo.early_game: Yasuo harasses constantly. Play safe and farm.
Yasuo.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His split push is relevant. Teamfight grouped.
Yasuo.late_game: He outscales as a split pusher. You scale as a support tank. Even late.
Yasuo.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Yasuo.scaling: He outscales as a split pusher. You scale as a support tank.
Yasuo.positioning: Stay away from minions to prevent E dashes. Group for fights.

Tahm Kench.trading_pattern: Tahm's A damage and W sustain are strong. Your E taunt is risky on him.
Tahm Kench.ability_to_dodge: His W tongue — move sideways to avoid. If hit, he stuns and pulls you.
Tahm Kench.early_game: Tahm is strong early. Play safe and farm.
Tahm Kench.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His tankiness is high. Teamfight grouped.
Tahm Kench.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You scale as a support tank. Even late.
Tahm Kench.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.

Akali.trading_pattern: Akali's all-in is strong early. Your E taunt is good but she's mobile.
Akali.ability_to_dodge: Her R dash — move perpendicular to avoid. She dashes twice for burst.
Akali.early_game: Akali is strong early. Play safe and farm.
Akali.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. Her mobility is high. Teamfight grouped.
Akali.late_game: She outscales as an assassin. You scale as a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Akali.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Akali.scaling: Akali outscales as an assassin. You scale as a tank.
Akali.positioning: Group for fights. Use R to engage as a unit.

Master Yi.trading_pattern: Master Yi's Q reset is unpredictable. Your E taunt can lock him down. Trade when possible.
Master Yi.ability_to_dodge: His R dash reset — move unpredictably. Your E taunt stops him temporarily.
Master Yi.early_game: Master Yi is weak early. Trade and all-in when possible.
Master Yi.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. His reset potential is strong. Teamfight grouped.
Master Yi.late_game: He outscales as a reset champion. You scale as a support tank. Group.
Master Yi.win_condition: Get a lead early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
Master Yi.scaling: Master Yi outscales as a reset champ. You scale as a support tank.
Master Yi.positioning: Taunt him with E when possible. Group for fights.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is a bottom-lane ADC struggling top. Your E taunt is strong against him.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: His R snipe — move sideways to avoid. It deals long-range burst.
Smolder.early_game: Smolder is weak in top lane. All-in him hard.
Smolder.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. He scales with items. Teamfight grouped.
Smolder.late_game: He outscales as a ranged carry. You scale as a support tank. Group.
Smolder.win_condition: Kill him early. All-in constantly. Group for teamfights.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder outscales as a carry. You must win early.
Smolder.positioning: All-in him early. Group for fights.

Lee Sin.ability_to_dodge: His R kick — move perpendicular to avoid. It knocks you back and damages.
Lee Sin.early_game: Lee Sin is weak top. All-in him hard.
Lee Sin.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. He scales as a diver. Teamfight grouped.
Lee Sin.late_game: He outscales as a diver. You scale as a support tank. Group.

Lee Sin.positioning: All-in him early. Group for fights.

Gwen.trading_pattern: Gwen's short range makes her vulnerable. Your E taunt is strong against her.
Gwen.ability_to_dodge: Her E snip — move sideways to avoid. She zones a small area.
Gwen.early_game: Gwen is manageable. All-in her when possible.
Gwen.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful grouped. Her items help scale. Teamfight grouped.
Gwen.late_game: She outscales as a split pusher. You scale as a support tank. Group.
Gwen.win_condition: Get a lead early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage.
